---
title: "Project 4"
author: "Lu Bai"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#remotes::install_github("pbreheny/hdrm")
library(hdrm)    # For data generation
library(glmnet)  # For Lasso and Elastic Net
library(MASS)    # For AIC/BIC/Backward selection
library(dplyr)
```

## Simulation Setup: Parameters

```{r}
# Simulation setup: define parameters
# For reproducibility
set.seed(2026) 
iterations <- 100
n_vals <- c(250, 500)
rho_vals <- c(0, 0.35, 0.7)
p_total <- 20
p_active <- 5
# Define the beta vector
true_beta <- c(0.5/3, 1/3, 1.5/3, 2/3, 2.5/3, rep(0, 15))
```

## Data generation wrapper
```{r}
# Data generation wrapper
generate_sim_data <- function(n_size, rho_val) {
  data_obs <- gen_data(
    n = n_size, 
    p = p_total,
    p1 = p_active,
    beta = true_beta, 
    family = "gaussian", # Linear regression
    corr = "exch", # Use exchangeable correlation structure
    rho = rho_val
  )
  return(data_obs)
}
```

## Wrapper to evaluate performance for each method
```{r}
# Wrapper to evaluate performance for each method
evaluate_method <- function(selected_indices, X, y, true_beta) {
  p <- p_total
  active_idx <- 1:p_active
  noise_idx <- (p_active+1):p_total
  
  # Selection accuracy metrics (TPR/FPR) 
  tpr <- mean(active_idx %in% selected_indices)
  fpr <- mean(noise_idx %in% selected_indices)
  
  # Setup results for bias and coverage 
  # Non-selected variables are treated as estimates of zero
  betas_hat <- rep(0, p)
  coverage <- rep(0, p)
  type_i_err <- rep(0, p)
  type_ii_err <- rep(0, p)
  
  # Refit selected model for inference
  if (length(selected_indices) > 0) {
    # Refit the final selected model 
    X_sub <- X[, selected_indices, drop = FALSE]
    refit_mod <- lm(y ~ X_sub)
    
    # Extract coefficients and CIs (excluding intercept)
    refit_coefs <- coef(refit_mod)[-1]
    refit_ci <- confint(refit_mod)[-1, , drop = FALSE]
    refit_pvals <- summary(refit_mod)$coefficients[-1, 4]
    
    betas_hat[selected_indices] <- refit_coefs
    
    # coverage and errors for selected variables 
    for (j in seq_along(selected_indices)) {
      idx <- selected_indices[j]
      # 95% CI Coverage
      if (true_beta[idx] >= refit_ci[j, 1] && true_beta[idx] <= refit_ci[j, 2]) {
        coverage[idx] <- 1
      }
      # Type I Error
      if (idx > 5 && refit_pvals[j] < 0.05) type_i_err[idx] <- 1
      # Type II Error
      if (idx <= 5 && refit_pvals[j] >= 0.05) type_ii_err[idx] <- 1
    }
  }
  # Non-selected variables: estimate=0, no interval 
  unselected_idx <- setdiff(1:p, selected_indices)
  for (idx in unselected_idx) {
    # Coverage is 0 if it should be selected but didn't
    coverage[idx] <- ifelse(true_beta[idx] == 0, 1, 0)
    # If not selected, we didn't reject H0; Type II error if true_beta != 0
    if (idx <= 5) type_ii_err[idx] <- 1
  }
  
  bias <- betas_hat - true_beta
  
  return(c(TPR = tpr, FPR = fpr, 
           Bias_Avg = mean(bias), 
           Coverage_Avg = mean(coverage),
           TypeI_Avg = mean(type_i_err[6:20]),
           TypeII_Avg = mean(type_ii_err[1:5])))
}
```
